articles.title: Red Sox draft SS Jake Schaffner with No. 20 pick
articles.description:
MLB.com tabbed Schaffner the 75th-ranked prospect in the 2026 draft.

The post Red Sox draft SS Jake Schaffner with No. 20 pick appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox selected shortstop Jake Schaffner with the 20th overall pick in the 2026 draft.
Schaffner is ranked 75th among prospects, according to MLB.com.
His addition aims to strengthen the Red Sox's infield for future seasons.

articles.title: Sail Boston 2026: The Grand Parade of Sail is rooted in rich history and tradition in the Commonwealth
articles.description:
The Grand Parade of Sail gave onlookers a chance to marvel at timelessly crafted boats that fueled generations of trade and travel.

The post Sail Boston 2026: The Grand Parade of Sail is rooted in rich history and tradition in the Commonwealth appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sail Boston 2026 will showcase historic boats in a Grand Parade of Sail.
The event celebrates maritime history, attracting thousands of local spectators.
Residents can expect increased tourism and local business engagement during the event.
